connectivity.connectionError: Dropdown menu banner shown when network is up but API requests are failing
connectivity.lastUpdateFailed: Dropdown menu row shown after 2 consecutive failed updates. %1$@ is the time of last failure.
connectivity.offline: Dropdown menu banner shown when device is offline (no network path)
about.heading.stale_data: About window section heading for stale data legend
about.line.additional_windows: About window: description of additional usage numbers
about.line.warning_icon: About window status icon legend — refresh warning (triangle icon, distinct from circle degraded icon)
about.line.bold_suffix: About window color coding legend — suffix after bold label
about.line.color_intro: About window color coding intro line
about.line.first_window: About window: description of first/shortest usage number
about.line.orange: About window color coding legend — includes trailing newline
about.line.red: About window color coding legend — includes trailing newline
about.line.stale_prefix: About window stale data legend — describes the bold ! prefix shown in menu bar when data is outdated
about.secondary.additional_explain: About window: explanation of when additional windows appear
about.secondary.outpacing: About window projection explanation (replaces old 'outpacing' explanation)
about.secondary.refresh_explain: About window refresh behavior explanation — describes three-mode adaptive polling
about.window.title: About window title bar
credentials.alert.invalid_org.message: Alert message for invalid organization ID format
credentials.alert.invalid_org.title: Alert title for invalid organization ID
credentials.alert.missing.message: Alert message when credentials are empty
credentials.alert.missing.title: Alert title when credentials are empty
credentials.alert.save_failed.message: Alert message when keychain save fails
credentials.alert.save_failed.title: Alert title when keychain save fails
credentials.configure: Inline error when credentials are not yet set up
duration.hours: Duration format: hours only (e.g. '3h'). %1$ld is the number of hours.
duration.hours_minutes: Duration format: hours and minutes (e.g. '2h 30m'). %1$ld is hours, %2$ld is minutes.
duration.minutes: Duration format: minutes only (e.g. '45m'). %1$ld is the number of minutes.
error.unexpected_status: Service error: unexpected HTTP status code. %ld is the status code number.
graph.now: Graph 'now' marker label and hover tooltip current-time label
graph.placeholder: Graph placeholder text when no reset data is available
graph.stats.blocked: Graph stats: usage at 100%%, blocked. %1$@ is time until reset.
graph.stats.collecting: Graph stats: not enough data for rate calculation. No format args.
graph.stats.idle: Graph stats: zero consumption rate. %1$ld is headroom percent.
graph.stats.limit_soon: Graph stats: rate projects to hit limit. %1$@ is rate, %2$@ is how long before reset the limit will be hit.
graph.stats.limit_unknown: Graph stats: rate projects to hit limit, no exact time. %1$@ is rate.
graph.stats.projected: Graph stats: rate with projection. %1$@ is rate, %2$ld is projected percent.
guide.org_id_label: Bold label in credential guide step 4
guide.step1.prefix: Credential guide step 1 — text before the link
guide.step2: Credential guide step 2 — wrap terms in **double asterisks** to render them bold
guide.step3.prefix: Credential guide step 3 — text before refresh icon
guide.step3.suffix: Credential guide step 3 — text after refresh icon (includes newline)
guide.step4.hint: Credential guide step 4 — hint text before 'Organization ID' label
guide.step4.prefix: Credential guide step 4 — intro text (includes newline)
guide.step5: Credential guide step 5 — wrap terms in **double asterisks** to render them bold
menu.about: Menu item to open the About window
menu.credentials.configure: Menu placeholder when credentials are not set
menu.interval: Current polling interval label in menu. %@ is the formatted duration (e.g. 30s, 2m, 10m).
menu.loading: Menu placeholder while data is loading
menu.next: Next poll time label in menu. %@ is the formatted time.
menu.quit: Menu item to quit the app
menu.refresh: Menu item to trigger an immediate refresh
menu.resets.prefix: Opening fragment of 'resets in 2h 30m' in usage attributed title
menu.section.incidents: Menu section header for active incidents
menu.section.services: Menu section header for service status
menu.section.usage: Menu section header for usage data
menu.updated: Last refresh time label in menu. %@ is the formatted time.
prefs.reset_sound: Checkbox label for playing a sound when a critical usage limit resets
prefs.window.title: Preferences window title bar
rate.minimal: Rate format: rate too small to display per-day (shows '< 1%/d')
rate.per_day: Rate format: percent per day. %1$ld is the rate value.
rate.per_hour: Rate format: percent per hour. %1$ld is the rate value.
setup.button.start: Primary action button in setup window
setup.window.title: Setup window title bar
window.scope.all: Label for all-models scope, shown when same-duration model-specific window exists
